---
title: 'Threads'
date: '2014-03-13T02:40:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Texas Cows and Crafts'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '4752703174418094860'
blogger_filename: '/p/threads.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Texas Cows and Crafts/feed.atom'
---

<div style="text-align: center;">
<span style="color: #20124d; font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/search/label/Threads">"Threads" consists of all things needle and thread. </a></span></div>
<div style="background: #5e3f9d; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: inset 0 0px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5), 0 1px 0 #000; text-align: center;">
<embed flashvars="host=picasaweb.google.com&amp;hl=en_US&amp;feat=flashalbum&amp;RGB=0x5e3f9d&amp;feed=https%3A%2F%2Fpicasaweb.google.com%2Fdata%2Ffeed%2Fapi%2Fuser%2F115276805483167457930%2Falbumid%2F5988507088583349361%3Falt%3Drss%26kind%3Dphoto%26hl%3Den_US" height="229" pluginspage="http://www.macromedia.com/go/getflashplayer" src="https://photos.gstatic.com/media/slideshow.swf" type="application/x-shockwave-flash" width="344"></embed></div>
<br />
<br />
<div style="text-align: center;">
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/search/label/Rope%20Pottery" target="_blank"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rope-pots-c8a53f6221b0.jpg" height="210" width="320" /></a>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;&nbsp;<span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif; font-size: xx-large; vertical-align: 200%;">&nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/search/label/Rope%20Pottery" target="_blank">Bowls 'n Things</a></span></div>
</div>
<br />
<br />
<div style="text-align: center;">
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/search/label/Purses%20n%20Bags" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: xx-large; vertical-align: 200%;" target="_blank">Purses and Bags</a>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/search/label/Purses%20n%20Bags" target="_blank"><img height="216" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/white-20and-20blue-20plarn-20bag-20upclose-e059463754b0.jpg" width="288" /></a></div>
</div>
<br />
<br />
<div style="text-align: center;">
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/search/label/Quilts" target="_blank"><img height="216" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-3224-f8fb2a0befe6.jpg" width="288" /></a>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;<span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif; font-size: xx-large; vertical-align: 200%;">&nbsp; &nbsp;&nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/search/label/Quilts" target="_blank">Quilts</a></span></div>
</div>
<br />
<br />
<div style="text-align: center;">
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/search/label/Sewing%20Kits" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: xx-large; vertical-align: 200%;" target="_blank">Sewing Kits</a>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/search/label/Sewing%20Kits" target="_blank"><img height="216" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/to-20be-20sort-202012-20317-e07bb6fce1a1.jpg" width="288" /></a></div>
</div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
